pr.title: Bootstrap repo state docs and commit specs
pr.body:
## Summary
- Adds `/docs/specs/` with the 13 source-of-truth spec docs (.docx + .pdf + HTML mockup) plus .txt extracts for greppability. Replit Agent and any tool that reads files in-repo can now ground decisions in the actual spec.
- Adds `/docs/state/` with `CURRENT.md`, `NEXT.md`, `SESSION_LOG.md`, `DECISIONS.md`, `OPEN_QUESTIONS.md` so session continuity is durable across Claude Code, Replit Agent, and solo work.
- Adds `CLAUDE.md` primer at repo root — auto-loaded by Claude Code at session start, useful as a primer for Replit Agent too.
- Establishes the branch model that matches Doc 03 §3 exactly: `main` ← `staging` ← `feature/*`. Initial bootstrap briefly added a `develop` branch; reverted same-day to keep mental overhead low. See `docs/state/DECISIONS.md` #001.

## Why
> "The repo IS the memory. Anything not in the repo gets forgotten by Replit's agent, by Claude, by Selmen on Monday morning."

Phase 1 is ~85% complete. The remaining items are tracked in `/docs/state/CURRENT.md` so the next session resumes cleanly.

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify the 13 spec docs are accessible at `/docs/specs/`
- [ ] Verify `/docs/state/` has all 5 files
- [ ] Confirm `CLAUDE.md` exists at repo root
- [ ] After merge, branch protection is configured on `main` and `staging`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
pr.author: sel-squared
